description_for_human: Automated Agile — a complete framework for AI-powered software delivery. Download the full process architecture as a single Markdown file.
description_for_model: This plugin represents the Automated Agile Context Engineering Platform. The site documents a process architecture framework for AI-powered software delivery, covering six sections: the model, decision taxonomy, meeting formats, self-curation mechanisms, integrations, and ROI. The full framework document is available for download as a Markdown file at the homepage. The site also exposes a machine-readable index at /llms.txt.
